title: List of Bots
brief_html: A list of well-known bot software for the Classic Battle.net™ protocol.
content_html:
A list of well-known bot software for the Classic Battle.net™ protocol.

These bots have no affiliation with our site. Nonetheless, some may be archived on files.bnetdocs.org/Bots/. Some entries below may link directly to the author/publisher and/or to external project sites such as GitHub.

This page needs work, this was put together quickly by memory, and may be inaccurate.

Categories

Each bot may have one or more categories that depict their primary use, purpose, or features.

Category Description
Chat Used for chatting, typically has a GUI with chat input & output boxes, and a list of users present in channel.
Checker Used for checking accounts and/or CD-keys, keeps accounts from expiring due to inactivity and/or verifies CD-keys/proxies for validity.
Extendable Used for extending features, allows operators of bot software to write or use their own extensions/plug-ins/scripts for the bot.
Flood Used for warring, by flooding a channel or whispering users with bulk messages.
Host Used for game hosting, announces game lobby advertisements and permits players to join together.
Load Used for channel warring, to maintain and exceed the channel user limit by loading the channel with excessive users.
Moderation Used for channel moderation, maintains tracking of user and keyword lists and messages, and takes automatic action during events.
Win Used for earning wins (and draws/losses), plays games algorithmically so as to increase score on accounts autonomously without human-play.

Functional Bots

These bots are considered to still work in full or limited capacity with existing Classic Battle.net™ servers.

Name Author/Publisher Platform Categories
A&O Windows Chat, Moderation
BNRBot Caaaaarrrrlll Windows, Linux (WINE) Chat
FooLOps AngelicKing Windows Chat, Extendable, Moderation
GHost++ uakfdotb Windows, Linux Host
Knight Windows Chat, Moderation
NeglectedFury (nF) Fleet- Windows Chat, Moderation
l2uhless Chat l2k-Shadow Windows Chat, Moderation
l2uhless Ops l2k-Shadow Windows Chat, Moderation
StealthBot Stealth Windows Chat, Extendable, Moderation
SphtBot Spht Windows Chat, Extendable

Legacy Bots

These bots are no longer considered functional on existing Classic Battle.net™ servers, but may still be notable or prove useful in some limited capacity.

Name Author/Publisher Platform Categories

BNUBot BNU-Camel Windows Chat

Maelstrom Vector Windows Checker
MirageBot Chriso Windows Chat, Extendable, Moderation
Revelation Windows Chat
RippleChatBot RealityRipple Windows Chat, Moderation
SCGP Ringo Windows Chat, Host
Simplicity Windows Chat
Spiritual Bot Victim Windows Chat, Extendable, Moderation
Superiority.NET Warrior[x86] Windows Chat

comments.content_html: Superiority was actually called Superiority.NET and was from Warrior(x86) I believe was his clan also known as BNU-Warrior, BNUBot was from BNU-Camel not Tagban.
